Benchmarks

Evidence and measurement posture

Benchmark narratives are positioned as methodology-led and scope-limited to avoid inflated performance claims.

Current benchmark posture

Crowkis benchmarking documents focus on proving measurable value while avoiding overclaims beyond tested scope.

Source: crowkis/crowkis.docs/CROWKIS_VECTOR_BENCHMARKING.md

Methodology-first communication

Benchmark narratives emphasize dataset/workload/machine transparency and staged benchmark goals.

Source: crowkis/crowkis.docs/CROWKIS_MARKET_LEADER_STRATEGY.md

Crowkis is the intelligent control and cache layer between applications and LLM providers.

Built in Rust. Designed for safe reuse, lower latency, and lower spend.
